title: CFTRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply for the 02 Project Associate I Posts
description: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CFTRI) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 02 Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the CFTRI Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Us...
